## BaseRatingFilterLabel class

Renders a label for a rating filter, allowing to override the elements used to paint the rating.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export default class BaseRatingFilterLabel extends Vue 
```
<b>Extends:</b> Vue

|  [filter](./x-components.baseratingfilterlabel.filter.md) |  | BooleanFilter | The filter data to render. |
|  [max](./x-components.baseratingfilterlabel.max.md) |  | number | Maximum number of elements to paint. |
